category_sources: source_facts.description says it is grep for Japanese users of Vim.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jvgrep; source_facts.repo project is mattn/jvgrep.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the best supplied official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/mattn/jvgrep, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies grep/search behavior and Vim/Japanese focus; current_curation.tags includes cli.
